data.name: Soy Supremacy
data.detailed_description:
Welcome in the brand new world of Soy Supremacy !

By day: Serve bland, approved meals under the watchful eye of Officer Slayla. Profit margins? Almost non-existent.

Slayla: Follow the rules, or... I'll punish you.

By night: Your cafe transforms. Beneath the counter you have juicy steaks. greasy burgers and soda with a real sugar. And Babe, your lovely childhood friends, love it all! 

Babe: Can you lick it for me please?

You definitely need some help! And Bunny will help you. In return... you'll have to make her happy.

Bunny: Please, I'm begging you... Slap me harder!

What the future looks like? How will you manage those three women?

This is a new adventure by the creators of Upgrade My Heart, Reboot My Heart and Cultural Exchange. Bundle Available.
data.about_the_game:

What the future looks like? How will you manage those three women?

This is a new adventure by the creators of Upgrade My Heart, Reboot My Heart and Cultural Exchange. Bundle Available.
data.short_description: Run a vegan cafe by day, sell illegal meat & fast food by night! Romance rebellious girls while dodging the law in the world of Soy Supremacy, romantic and sweet visual novel. Can you make profit, make your girls happy and stay out of jail?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • 處理器: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible processor, or Intel Atom™ 1.6GHz or faster processor for netbook class devices
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 and/or OpenGL 3.3 compatible video card
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • Processor: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible processor, or Intel Atom™ 1.6GHz or faster processor for netbook class devices
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 and/or OpenGL 3.3 compatible video card
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
